reviews.comment:
Muy lindo parque con juegos y cobertizos para guardar los autos y resguardarlos del sol. Es un lindo alto en el camino para distenderse y estirarse, mientras los chicos juegan. A la estacion no entre, asi es que no puedo opinar de la misma.

(Translated by Google)
A very nice park with playground equipment and carports to keep cars out of the sun. It's a great place to stop and relax while the kids play. I didn't go inside the station, so I can't comment on it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNc2UzLVBREAE

reviews.comment:
Había mucha gente y sólo dos empleadas por los que se hizo una cola re larga.  Las hamburguesas no son las de full son unas que te las hacen ahí en el momento parecen la de los carritos,  viene con una gaseosa tampoco había gaseosa light o sin azúcar. Mucha gente y poca capacidad de la estación. Si venís por la ruta 8 y pasas por sampacho te recomiendo comas algo ahí preferentemente,  es una ypf grande y mejor atendida. Me arrepentí de no haber almorzado ahí una hora antes de Villa Mercedes.

(Translated by Google)
There were a lot of people and only two employees, so the line was really long. The hamburgers weren't the ones from Full; they're made right there, like the ones from the food carts. They come with a soda, but they didn't have any diet or sugar-free options. It was very crowded and the station didn't have enough space. If you're coming along Route 8 and passing through Sampacho, I recommend you eat something there; it's a larger YPF station and the service is better. I regretted not having lunch there an hour before Villa Mercedes.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNNXNDa05BEAE

reviews.comment:
Pasé a las 23 hs y el shop está cerrado!!!! Atiende de 06 a 22 hs. Muy mal en ése sentido. Tiene todos los combustibles. Baños limpios!!

(Translated by Google)
I went by at 11 PM and the shop was closed! It's open from 6 AM to 10 PM. Very bad about that. They have all the fuels. Clean restrooms!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNMG9qV3N3RRAB
